## Runtime.IRuntimeContext.getJournalsForFilling() method

Gets all journal records for a filling (across all versions).

**Signature:**

```typescript
getJournalsForFilling(fillingId: FillingId): ReadonlyArray<IFillingRecipeJournalRecord>;
```
